steps.expected: Forgot Password page opens from sign-in
steps.observed: The sign-in page linked correctly to /forgot-password and rendered the email field plus Send Reset Link CTA

steps.expected: Show the 'Check your email' success state
steps.observed: The UI showed 'Check your email' with 'If an account exists for utv-auth-rerun-20260315@example.com, we've sent a password reset link.' and the API log recorded POST /api/auth/request-password-reset -> 200 plus a Password reset URL

steps.expected: Show the same success copy without leaking account existence
steps.observed: The UI showed the same success-state pattern and copy for the unregistered address, while the API log still returned POST /api/auth/request-password-reset -> 200 and only logged 'User not found' server-side

steps.action: Click 'Back to sign in' from the success state
steps.observed: The Back to sign in link returned the browser to http://localhost:3000/sign-in

evidence.network: API log showed POST /api/auth/request-password-reset -> 200 for utv-auth-rerun-20260315@example.com with Password reset URL: https://scopepm-api.ashish-hudar.workers.dev/api/auth/reset-password/8l1zlcd2ms6OOGUm2TREFv79?callbackURL=http%3A%2F%2Flocalhost%3A3000%2Freset-password ; API log also showed POST /api/auth/request-password-reset -> 200 for utv-auth-rerun-missing-20260315@example.com despite a server-side 'User not found' log entry.

assertions.title: Successful password reset shows success state

steps.action: Inspect the API log after the registered forgot-password submission
steps.expected: Obtain a real reset link/token for the isolated account
steps.observed: Captured the latest Password reset URL ending in token 8l1zlcd2ms6OOGUm2TREFv79 from the API server log

steps.action: Open the reset flow with that real token on the app UI and submit Scopepm!567 twice
steps.expected: Reset succeeds through the real UI and the app shows a success state or redirects to /sign-in
steps.observed: The /reset-password?token=8l1zlcd2ms6OOGUm2TREFv79 form accepted the new password, POST /api/auth/reset-password returned 200 in the API log, and the UI showed 'Password updated' with a 'Sign in with your new password' link
The success CTA navigated to http://localhost:3000/sign-in

evidence.network: API log showed Password reset URL: https://scopepm-api.ashish-hudar.workers.dev/api/auth/reset-password/8l1zlcd2ms6OOGUm2TREFv79?callbackURL=http%3A%2F%2Flocalhost%3A3000%2Freset-password and POST /api/auth/reset-password -> 200 in 4s.

frictions.description: Opening the logged Better Auth reset URL directly in the browser session returned an 'Internal Server Error' document instead of landing on the in-app reset form.
frictions.resolution: Used the real token from that logged URL on http://localhost:3000/reset-password?token=<token> to complete the UI reset flow and verify the success state.

summary: Retested 2 assertions: both passed. Forgot-password now shows the expected success state for registered and unregistered emails, and the real reset-token flow reaches the password-updated success state with a sign-in link.
